name: Auro Brass Wall Sconce
description: A minimalist brushed brass wall sconce emitting warm 2700K light, ideal for reading corners and cozy living spaces. Metal construction with a slim arm design.

name: Linen Dome Floor Lamp
description: A soft linen dome floor lamp with a natural fabric shade that diffuses warm light throughout the room. Perfect for bedrooms and quiet reading nooks.

name: Vega Matte Pendant
description: A sleek matte black pendant light with a cylindrical metal shade. Delivers neutral white light at 3000K, perfect above kitchen islands and dining tables.

name: Volta Edison Bulb Chandelier
description: An industrial-style chandelier with exposed Edison bulbs and antique gold metal frame. Creates a dramatic warm amber glow at 2200K.

name: Birch Wood Table Lamp
description: A compact birch wood table lamp with a white fabric shade. Emits warm 2700K light, designed for bedside tables and minimal desk setups.

name: Nero Arc Floor Lamp
description: A tall arc floor lamp in matte black with an adjustable arm. Neutral 3000K light makes it ideal for home offices and focused work environments.

name: Ceramic Globe Table Lamp
description: A handcrafted ceramic globe base table lamp with a linen shade. Warm 2700K ambient light with an artisanal, organic feel.

name: Koto Brass Ceiling Spot
description: A compact brushed brass ceiling spotlight with a rotating head. 3000K neutral white beam for task lighting in kitchens and hallways.

name: Fog Glass Pendant
description: A frosted glass sphere pendant light that softly diffuses warm 2700K light. Simple and elegant, suited for dining rooms and entryways.

name: Riviera Rattan Pendant
description: A handwoven rattan pendant with a warm golden inner finish. Projects dappled warm light patterns, creating a cozy boho atmosphere in bedrooms.

name: Stahl Industrial Pendant
description: A raw steel industrial pendant with a deep matte black finish. Wide 3000K beam ideal for kitchen islands and loft-style dining spaces.

name: Solv Brass Reading Lamp
description: A slender articulated desk lamp in brushed brass. Delivers warm focused 2700K light exactly where needed, perfect for reading and writing.

name: Luna Opal Glass Wall Light
description: A round opal glass wall light with a chrome fitting. Emits soft diffused 2700K light, suitable for bathrooms and hallways.

name: Madera Wood Arc Lamp
description: A curved solid oak arc floor lamp with an antique gold metal base. Warm 2700K light with an organic, natural character for living rooms.

name: Deco Fan Ceiling Light
description: An art-deco inspired ceiling light with fan-shaped metal petals in antique gold. Statement 3000K light for high-ceiling living rooms.

name: Slim Track Spotlight Bar
description: A three-head track spotlight bar in clean white metal. Cool 4000K daylight beam ideal for home offices, studios, and task-heavy workspaces.

name: Ember Amber Glass Pendant
description: A hand-blown amber glass pendant with antique gold hardware. Casts a warm 2200K amber glow that creates intimate and dramatic dining atmospheres.

name: Kube Concrete Table Lamp
description: A compact cube-shaped concrete-effect ceramic table lamp with a matte black cord. Neutral 3000K light with an urban industrial character.

name: Bloom Brass Chandelier
description: A five-arm chandelier with flower-shaped brass cups. Warm 2700K light distributed across the room with an elegant art-deco character.

name: Fjord Rope Pendant
description: A handcrafted rope-wrapped pendant with a white cotton finish. Warm 2700K light and natural texture bring a coastal rustic feel to bedrooms.

name: Helix Chrome Pendant
description: A high-shine chrome helix pendant with a wide beam. Cool 4000K task light designed for professional-style kitchens and utility spaces.

name: Petal Ceramic Wall Sconce
description: A petal-shaped white ceramic wall sconce. Emits soft diffused 2700K light, adding warmth and organic texture to bathrooms and bedrooms.

name: Grid Steel Ceiling Light
description: A flat grid-pattern steel ceiling flush mount in matte black. Neutral 3000K light with a strong industrial geometric presence.

name: Halo Brass Ring Pendant
description: A circular halo ring pendant in brushed brass with integrated warm 2700K LEDs. Elegant and sculptural, ideal above dining tables.

name: Moss Green Table Lamp
description: A glazed ceramic table lamp in deep moss green with antique gold hardware. Warm 2700K light adds earthy cozy warmth to any living space.

name: Arch Brass Floor Torchiere
description: A tall arched torchiere in brushed brass that washes ceilings with warm 2700K uplight. Dramatic and sophisticated for high-ceiling living rooms.

name: Oak Tripod Floor Lamp
description: A three-legged solid oak tripod floor lamp with a white drum shade. Warm 2700K light and natural wood legs bring Scandinavian calm to living rooms.

name: Micro Brass Spot Clip
description: A small clip-on brass spotlight for shelves and desks. Focused 3000K beam in a tiny brushed brass body, ideal for precision task lighting.

name: Smoke Glass Bell Pendant
description: A smoked glass bell pendant with antique gold fittings. Warm filtered 2700K light creates a moody, refined glow for dining rooms and bars.

name: Loft Fabric Drum Pendant
description: A wide fabric drum pendant in off-white linen. Emits warm diffused 2700K ambient light, perfect for bedrooms and open-plan living spaces.
